description: Leaf from a file of responsum, written in the hand of Shemuel Ha-Levi b. Saadya. Concerning a woman who was married to a man, but whom "the community" claimed was an enslaved woman and needs to get a deed of manumission first. Her husband refuses, and her previous owner (or alleged owner) claims she was not enslaved, and that she became Jewish out of her own free will (תהודת מן דאתה).
description_he: עלה מקובץ תשובות בכתב שמואל הלוי בן סעדיה. עניינו אישה נשואה שהקהילה טוענת כי הייתה שפחה ועליה לקבל שטר שחרור; בעלה מסרב.
